title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Medlife Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Medlife Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Medlife Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Jodhpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
